title: F-15E Strike Eagles Deploy to Jordan
detail: The Pentagon confirms that 24 F-15E Strike Eagles from RAF Lakenheath's 48th Fighter Wing have arrived at Muwaffaq al-Salti Air Base in Jordan, with additional F-35A stealth fighters en route. The deployment transforms the base from a counterinsurgency logistics hub into a high-intensity strike platform, signaling preparation for potential state-level confrontation with Iran.

title: USS Lincoln CSG Transits Toward Gulf
detail: USS Abraham Lincoln carrier strike group, announced by Trump the previous day as part of a US 'armada,' transits the Arabian Sea en route to the Persian Gulf. The strike group includes guided-missile cruiser USS Mobile Bay and destroyers USS Halsey and USS O'Kane. Iran's navy monitors the transit and warns of 'provocative' movements.

title: Iran Protest Death Toll Surpasses 5,000
detail: Human rights organizations report that the death toll from Iran's crackdown on nationwide protests has surpassed 5,000, with the regime accused of concealing casualties through night burials and restricting hospital access. The State Department condemns the 'unconscionable violence against peaceful demonstrators' and announces expanded visa restrictions on Iranian officials.
